evals.prompt: Turn this into a magazine (Editorial style, Moderate rewrite): [AI Writing Revolution article]
evals.expected_output: Paginated HTML magazine with editorial style, rewritten content, images, view toggle

assertions.name: has-paginated-pages
assertions.text: HTML contains data-page attributes for multiple pages

assertions.name: has-page-flip-nav
assertions.text: Has arrow button navigation and keyboard event listeners

assertions.name: has-view-toggle
assertions.text: Has single/spread view mode toggle button

assertions.name: has-cover-page
assertions.text: Has a distinct cover page with class cover or equivalent

assertions.name: has-drop-cap
assertions.text: Uses ::first-letter or .drop-cap CSS styling

assertions.name: has-pull-quote
assertions.text: Contains a pull-quote element with distinct styling

assertions.name: has-page-numbers
assertions.text: Contains page number elements

assertions.name: has-rewritten-headline
assertions.text: Headline differs from original title 'The AI Writing Revolution'

assertions.name: self-contained
assertions.text: No external <link> stylesheet or <script src=http...> tags (images OK)

assertions.name: has-gutter-shadow
assertions.text: CSS contains box-shadow: inset for binding simulation

assertions.name: editorial-serif-fonts
assertions.text: Uses Georgia or serif font stack for body text

assertions.name: editorial-dark-cover
assertions.text: Cover has dark background (gradient or dark hex color)

assertions.name: editorial-accent-color
assertions.text: Uses red accent color close to #c0392b

evals.prompt: Make this into a magazine page (Vibrant Lifestyle style, Full rewrite): [Kyoto travel essay]
evals.expected_output: Paginated HTML magazine with Vogue/GQ style, fully rewritten, sourced images

assertions.name: has-paginated-pages
assertions.text: HTML contains data-page attributes for multiple pages

assertions.name: has-page-flip-nav
assertions.text: Has arrow button navigation and keyboard event listeners

assertions.name: has-view-toggle
assertions.text: Has single/spread view mode toggle button

assertions.name: has-cover-page
assertions.text: Has a distinct cover page

assertions.name: has-drop-cap
assertions.text: Uses ::first-letter or .drop-cap CSS styling

assertions.name: has-pull-quote
assertions.text: Contains a pull-quote element with distinct styling

assertions.name: has-page-numbers
assertions.text: Contains page number elements

assertions.name: has-rewritten-headline
assertions.text: Headline differs from original title 'Autumn in Kyoto'

assertions.name: self-contained
assertions.text: No external <link> stylesheet or <script src=http...> tags (images OK)

assertions.name: has-gutter-shadow
assertions.text: CSS contains box-shadow: inset for binding simulation

assertions.name: lifestyle-gold-accent
assertions.text: Uses gold accent color close to #c9a96e

assertions.name: lifestyle-didot-font
assertions.text: References Didot or Bodoni font for headlines

assertions.name: has-sourced-images
assertions.text: Contains img tags with src URLs from Unsplash or similar

evals.prompt: Turn this markdown into a magazine (Tech Minimal style, Light rewrite): [WebAssembly article]
evals.expected_output: Paginated HTML magazine with Wired style, data callouts, sourced images

assertions.name: has-paginated-pages
assertions.text: HTML contains data-page attributes for multiple pages

assertions.name: has-page-flip-nav
assertions.text: Has arrow button navigation and keyboard event listeners

assertions.name: has-view-toggle
assertions.text: Has single/spread view mode toggle button

assertions.name: has-cover-page
assertions.text: Has a distinct cover page

assertions.name: has-pull-quote
assertions.text: Contains a pull-quote element with distinct styling

assertions.name: has-page-numbers
assertions.text: Contains page number elements

assertions.name: self-contained
assertions.text: No external <link> stylesheet or <script src=http...> tags (images OK)

assertions.name: has-gutter-shadow
assertions.text: CSS contains box-shadow: inset for binding simulation

assertions.name: tech-gradient-rule
assertions.text: Has gradient horizontal rule (linear-gradient with accent colors)

assertions.name: tech-monospace
assertions.text: Uses Courier New or monospace for data/stats elements

assertions.name: tech-data-callout
assertions.text: Has data callout boxes with stats displayed prominently

assertions.name: tech-accent-color
assertions.text: Uses accent color close to #ff0055

assertions.name: has-sourced-images
assertions.text: Contains img tags with src URLs from Unsplash or similar
